pr.title: 30-Layer Recursive GPT (10 Physical x 3 Recursive) + VRL + Parallel Muon

output.summary: Combines 10-layer recursion repeated 3× with VRL+MTP, Bigram/Trigram hashing, and Parallel Muon tuning for H100 plus int8+LZMA compression.
techniques: Recursive 10-layer stack applied thrice to simulate 30-layer depth with VRL-stabilized gating
Parallel Muon optimizer with Parameter Banking and activation checkpointing on H100
Int8 GPTQ calibration plus LZMA compression for sub-16MB deployment
